title: Hermitcraft Villagers Modded Addon
description: Addon to my Hermitcraft villagers ressource pack for modded (Guard Villagers, Straw Statues)
body:
<font color="#f02222">**Not updated to match 3.0.0**</font>

![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/effa30421fb6a10158051db4592a6cd2a9b83555.png)


### This is an addon for modded to be used along side [Hermitcraft Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hermitcraft-villagers)

Supported mods:

  - Guard Villagers (Both [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers-(fabricquilt)) and [Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers))

```   
      You must use the regular guard model, not the steve one
      You can get any skin by renaming just like villagers. List of possible names in the .pdf inside the pack
      But only a few soldier skined Hermit will naturally spawn     
```

      
  - [Straw Statues](https://modrinth.com/mod/straw-statues)

```   
      Rename a straw statue in the style tab will give it the texture
```

##
### This pack require at least [Entity Texture Features 6.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [Entity Model Features 2.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [Entity Sound Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf)

[Chime](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime) & [Omega Mute](https://modrinth.com/mod/omega-mute) are optional but recommanded for the immersion

It uses some ETF/EMF exclusive features and therefore is not compatible with optifine!
